overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a rainy, neon-lit futuristic city at night. The player character walks along busy sidewalks, passes parked vehicles and storefronts, and crosses a large intersection. The footage is from a video game with high-quality cinematic graphics featuring heavy rain, reflective wet surfaces, and dense urban architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic downtown, walking along a wet concrete sidewalk bordered by a tall retaining wall on the right and a busy multi-lane street on the left. The camera follows a woman with an orange umbrella and a small child walking ahead, while neon signs illuminate the tall glass buildings in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes a large futuristic garbage truck parked along the right side of the sidewalk, temporarily narrowing the walkable space. A man in a teal shirt walks ahead as the scene passes by a building entrance with concrete stairs, while the retaining wall continues alongside.

segments.scene_description: Past the truck, the sidewalk opens into a commercial zone with large glass storefronts displaying mannequins in illuminated windows. The camera walks by purple vending machines and digital billboards while navigating through a moderate crowd of pedestrians carrying umbrellas in the rain.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide open intersection with a large crosswalk, traffic light gantries, and an elevated highway visible in the background. The camera crosses the street with a dense crowd of pedestrians carrying umbrellas, surrounded by towering red-lit skyscrapers in the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy futuristic downtown that evolves from a narrow sidewalk into a vast, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by following a woman with an orange umbrella and a child along a wet concrete path bordered by a tall retaining wall and a busy multi-lane street. As the camera moves forward, the path temporarily narrows while passing a large futuristic garbage truck and a building entrance before the space opens into a commercial zone. The scene then shifts past illuminated glass storefronts, purple vending machines, and digital billboards as the camera navigates through a crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the environment expands into a wide open intersection where the camera crosses a large crosswalk beneath towering red-lit skyscrapers and an elevated highway.
